prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约1638→3278→2793→3419→1569，波动较大，2022年因断档大幅后移至3278名，2023–2024年维持在2793–3419名区间，2025年大幅回升至1569名，近5年整体呈震荡格局；2025年基准位次约1569名；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年45人、2022年45人、2023年46人、2024年45人、2025年48人；2026年计划52人，较2025年扩招约8.3%，扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字有上移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第26名、2022年第26名、2023年第24名、2024年第24名、2025年第24名、2026年第25名，稳居全国顶尖综合性大学行列；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及校园安全（盗摄偷盗）、学校管理（复试歧视本科背景）及录取断档信号；抖音热度总排名第5（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；2025年投档异常信号显示招生情况自2017年以来持续恶化，高分段和低分段均出现下滑；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共14个学科：化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A、应用经济学A、教育学A、生态学A、数学A-、法学A-、理论经济学A-、社会学A-、马克思主义理论A-、化学工程与技术A-；与招生专业高度关联，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热；内蒙古2026年考生总数约154000人，较2025年历史类+物理类合计116360人增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；厦门大学位于福建省（非本省），在内蒙古招生占比约1.3%–1.8%，属跨省招生，无本地保护效应；地域偏好上，内蒙古考生赴东南沿海高校意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至1569名的基准、2026年扩招约8.3%带来的竞争加剧、本省考生总数大幅增长约32%以及声誉偏负面等因素；预测2026年理科最低位次约1697名，区间1455–1939名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 1638 → 3278 → 2793 → 3419 → 1569, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to a gap, it dropped sharply to 3278th place. From 2023 to 2024, it remained in the range of 2793–3419. In 2025, it rebounded significantly to 1569th place. Over the past five years, the overall trend has been volatile. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1569th. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Inner Mongolia: 45 students in 2021, 45 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 48 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 52 students, an increase of about 8.3% compared to 2025. This expansion slightly intensifies competition, putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 26th in 2021, 26th in 2022, 24th in 2023, 24th in 2024, 24th in 2025, and 25th in 2026, firmly among the top comprehensive universities in the country. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism and theft), school management (discrimination against undergraduate background in reexaminations), and signals of enrollment gaps. On Douyin, it ranks 5th in overall popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention from applicants. Abnormal signals in the 2025 admission indicate that the enrollment situation has been continuously deteriorating since 2017, with declines in both high and low score segments. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Mathematics A-, Law A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, Marxist Theory A-, and Chemical Engineering and Technology A-. These are highly correlated with the enrollment majors, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of 116,360 for history and physics categories in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not the home province), with an enrollment share in Inner Mongolia of about 1.3%–1.8%, making it an inter-provincial enrollment without local protection effects. In terms of regional preference, Inner Mongolian examinees have a strong willingness to go to universities in the southeast coastal areas.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant rebound to 1569th place in 2025, the intensified competition due to an enrollment expansion of about 8.3% in 2026, a substantial increase of about 32% in the number of examinees in the province, and a negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 1697th, with a range of 1455–1939.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Accounting (including Accounting, Finance, Auditing, and Dual Degree Programs)
- Law (including Foreign-Related Legal Talent Base Experimental Class)
- Financial Engineering
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information)
- Economics (including Dual Degree Programs)
- Computer Science (Engineering Experimental Class AI and Computer).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (including Statistics)
- Energy and Power
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Physics (including Physics, Astronomy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Nanqiang Academy Excellence Leadership Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Nanqiang Academy Excellence Leadership Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1455–1939, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Aerospace/Chemical Engineering and Materials), Energy and Power, and Physics as main choices, with Tier 1 Accounting/Law/Computer Science/Electronic Information as reach options, and Tier 3 Nanqiang Academy Excellence Leadership Class as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1455), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1939), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 292 → 307 → 288 → 320 → 229, fluctuating narrowly within the 229–320 range, with a rebound to 229 in 2025, the best level in the past five years; over the past three years, it has moved up by about 91 places, showing a slight upward trend; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia: 15 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 19 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14, a reduction of about 26.3% compared to 2025, a significant reduction, easing competition, putting downward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top comprehensive universities in the country; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving campus safety and school management issues; total Douyin popularity ranking 5th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; the 2025 abnormal admission signal shows that the enrollment situation has been continuously deteriorating since 2017; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, with strong liberal arts-related disciplines including: Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Law A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Sociology A-, Marxist Theory A-, etc., demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, Teacher Training/Education are socially popular and recommended; the total number of candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, an increase of about 32% compared to the total of 116,360 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not the home province), with an enrollment share of about 1.3%–1.8% in Inner Mongolia, making it an inter-provincial enrollment with no local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the benchmark of the ranking rebounding to 229 in 2025, a significant reduction of about 26.3% in enrollment in 2026 easing competition, a substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of local candidates partially offsetting the reduction effect, and a negative reputation; the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 193, with a range of 143–243.
